Hey guys, welcome to the example walkthrough for the upgraded FAQ close. So for this one, we're going to turn back to the indestructible team by SoulPower. And the headline we start off here, which presupposes asking questions as the behavior of a buyer is this, questions your fellow female leaders, founders and CEOs ask before saying yes to an indestructible team. And once again, you really do want these to be the legit questions that your perfect buyer would be asking or has already asked. So here's how we start. Number one, this is all about taking that big obvious objection and turning that into their biggest opportunity. So the question goes, I want to do this, but I'm already spread way too thin. How much time is this going to take? So this is a very universal objection as far as like the time objection goes, but it's particularly present for really busy leaders, founders and CEOs. So that's why we're leading with it here. So the answer, we hear you, we've also gone to bed and woken up cuddled next to iPhone. So demonstrating some empathy there, skipped meals and felt like adding one more thing to a never ending to do list would wreck this whole game of human Tetris we've involuntarily subscribed to. But here's the thing, building an indestructible team that frees you up from this never ending time crunch will take dedicated time and commitment of at least five to seven hours per week. And that's only an impossible catch 22 if you let it be one. If you know right now that business as usual is unsustainable and a shortcut to burnout, then we insist you find a way to block off the time. So we're not hiding from the fact that this is going to take time. We're not hiding the fact that they're going to have to find a way to get it done, but we are promising that it's going to lead to their biggest opportunity. On our end, we promise to spare you from any impractical fluff or theoretical brain dumps, meaning every hour you invest in designing and implementing your indestructible team will have an exponential payoff. So there's a principle here that can be used for just about any type of offer. And it's what I call return on effort. You know, people aren't afraid of investing time, energy and resources into using your product. They just need to feel the confidence that for every hour or every resource they put in, they're going to get an exponential return. So always keep that in mind. As a time starved leader of a high growth company committing this time is the most leveraged and valuable way to invest your energy. So once again, just repeating that this is their biggest opportunity. Second question. I've been holding off on growing my team or hiring altogether because I'm scared of adding to my already bloated overhead. Are you going to ask me to hire more people? So here we're taking their biggest fear and we're going to be pointing towards a very specific and unique aspect of our product or a course that addresses it. So maybe, maybe not in module two, once again, specific element of the product. We're going to take an intimate and honest look at both your current team makeup, as well as the indestructible team you'll need to have up and running in your business to get to where you want to go. When we do ask you to bring on new team members, you'll be equipped with the tools, frameworks and trackable KPIs to guarantee that you're set up to generate an immediate and impactful ROI with each new member you bring on. So it's alchemyzing that fear and once again, turning that into an opportunity, meaning you can hire an onboard with confidence knowing that each personnel decision is optimized for growth instead of just another expense that keeps you up at night. Third, this is where you're going to take one of those sacred cows and really transform that in a way that empowers action. So isn't scale a function of marketing, sales, processes, automation, etc. Yes, and marketing processes, automation and all other functions related to growing revenue expanding impact are rooted in an indestructible team of A players ready to carry it out with minimal supervision and dependence. What you'll install over the next 12 weeks is foundational and necessary for any marketing strategy, product development or opportunity you plan to capitalize on. Unfortunately, it's also the stuff that most businesses will skip. This is your invitation to create the strong foundation and scaffolding needed to scale in a sustainable way. Cool. Number four, this is where we're going to position against the competition and the competition in this case isn't necessarily another course or training, but the alternative in which people would be would be going for, which is a cheaper alternative, which would just be reading books on leadership that they could buy on Amazon. So I've read dozens of books on leadership and team building. How is this any different? So have we and we got nothing engaged them, but the mission here is extremely focused and outcome based design and implement an indestructible team that creates rapid scale and sustainable growth while freeing you up to work on your business instead of in it. No theories or case studies that will never apply to you. So positioning against those generalized books, just the hyper specific action steps needed to get your team up and running performing at an elite level ASAP. Cool. Number five, this is where we're going to really use this as a springboard into the whole ethos of soul powered. So I don't feel like I'm a good leader. Are you sure I can learn this? Yes, profitable team building and leadership is a learnable skill. So that's part of their ethos. And contrary to popular belief, you're not supposed to know how to do it out of the box. In fact, the skills that got you to where you are now may or may not have prepared you to step up as a leader. But here's the kicker. No matter how much temporary discomfort or self doubt you may be experiencing right now as a woman, we believe you were born to lead. So this is once again, repeating that ethos very clearly and boldly. That's why we've designed every aspect of the indestructible team to help you unlock and activate this innate and natural capacity. By the time you're done, you'll not only be at the helm of a thriving high performing team, but you'll feel more fully expressed as the leader you were born to be. Cool. Six, this is where we're going to take, um, one of those more universal objections. And some offers I use the time objection here, but since we already answered that, um, we're taking this one, does this work for both the virtual teams and in person teams? Yes, our clients have range from multinational fortune, 500 companies to digital nomads running the show from a MacBook Pro. The frameworks, worksheets and training modules all include carefully noted considerations for in person, virtual and blended teams. And then finally, number seven is where we would use that as a springboard into the offer, the payment options, and the optional eight, of course, would be the guarantee. So with all that said, this is the walkthrough for the upgraded FAQ. Take a breather, take a stab at it yourself, and we will see you in the next lesson.
